widgets.title: Screen
widgets.summary: Full-screen root: a layout template + a column of children. The usual root of a push_screen tree.

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Screen title; rendered by the foundation/list/pinned layouts (suppressed when room chrome owns the title).

fields.name: layout
fields.notes: 0 = foundation (safe-area scrolling column, default), 1 = centered, 2 = list (sticky title + rows), 3 = pinned (scrolling content + fixed bottom CTA).

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes, rendered top to bottom into the layout slot.

notes: The pinned layout's fixed bottom CTA (zui.h screen.cta) has no CBOR key - lyt 3 over the wire renders without a bottom CTA.

c.t: Pick an environment on the next page

widgets.title: Gap
widgets.summary: Fixed vertical spacer between siblings.

fields.name: height
fields.notes: Height in px; 0/omitted = theme default spacing.

widgets.title: Text
widgets.summary: Body text line; wraps at the display edge.

fields.name: text
fields.notes: The text. Wraps full-width; alignment follows the layout (centered template centers it).

notes: The zui.h color/center fields have no CBOR keys.

c.t: Plain body text wraps at the display edge of the 1.8 inch screen.

widgets.title: Title
widgets.summary: Large heading text.

fields.name: text
fields.notes: The heading text (large UI font).

widgets.title: Eyebrow
widgets.summary: Small uppercase context line (pixel-blue mono accent) above the payload.

fields.name: text
fields.notes: The context line. Keep it UPPERCASE and short.

widgets.title: Big
widgets.summary: Large display text - the one-glance payload (1-3 words).

fields.name: text
fields.notes: The display text (large font).

widgets.title: List
widgets.summary: Vertical column of children - typically row nodes (a swipe-up page).

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes (usually rows).

widgets.title: Row
widgets.summary: The standard list cell: leading icon, title (+ subtitle), trailing switch or chevron.

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Cell title.

fields.name: icon
fields.notes: Leading Lucide icon name (device icon subset).

fields.name: subtitle
fields.notes: Secondary line under the title.

fields.name: toggle
fields.notes: 1 = trailing switch (whole-row tap flips it).

fields.name: on
fields.notes: Initial switch state when tg = 1.

fields.name: chevron
fields.notes: 1 = trailing chevron.

fields.name: page ref
fields.notes: Swipe-up page ref ("app.export"): tap opens that page (v13 #358).

fields.name: spinner
fields.notes: 1 = leading live arc spinner replaces the icon (working glyph, v13 #358).

notes: The zui.h trailing value (val), icon color and custom icon image fields have no CBOR keys.
v13 #358: pg rows also render a trailing chevron; pre-v13 decoders skip pg/sp (inert row).

widgets.title: Button
widgets.summary: Pill button: label + optional icon, variant/size/color styling, v12 role + physical-key binding.

fields.name: label
fields.notes: One line. Max 24 ASCII chars in modal bodies (18 when key-bound).

fields.name: icon
fields.notes: Leading Lucide icon name.

fields.name: variant
fields.notes: 0 = filled (default), 1 = tinted, 2 = gray, 3 = plain, 4 = success, 5 = destructive.

fields.name: size
fields.notes: 0 = md (default), 1 = sm, 2 = icon (circle), 3 = icon-sm.

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Palette override (zui_color_ref): 0 = variant default, 1 = accent, 2 = ok, 3 = warn, 4 = danger, 5 = pixel, 6-8 = ink1-3, 9-10 = surface/surface2, 11-18 = vibrant blue/teal/green/amber/orange/crimson/iris/violet.

fields.name: role
fields.notes: v12 dispatch: "submit" | "dismiss" (terminal), "event" (pings, stays), "next" | "prev" (local paging). JSON takes the name; the wire carries the uint.

fields.name: key
fields.notes: v12 physical-button binding: "up", "down", "up.double", "down.double". The button renders the key glyph; hold is never bindable.

notes: An `id` makes taps report through the btn hook (modal action / widget event).
The zui.h hold (long-press fill) field has no CBOR key.

widgets.title: Button row
widgets.summary: Horizontal row of buttons, evenly stretched.

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes (btn nodes); each grows to an equal share.

widgets.title: Chips
widgets.summary: Wrapping row of label pills (on/off tinted).

fields.name: labels
fields.notes: Chip labels (max 16); the count sets the chip count.

fields.name: on flags
fields.notes: Per-chip 0/1 accent tint; a shorter list reads 0 for the tail.

widgets.title: Slider
widgets.summary: Continuous 0-100 slider.

fields.name: value
fields.notes: Initial value, 0-100.

fields.name: live
fields.notes: v12: with an `id`, stream value changes as widget events (debounced) while the modal stays up. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`.

notes: The zui.h leading icon field has no CBOR key.
With an `id` the final value collects into the terminal values{} map.

widgets.title: Segmented slider
widgets.summary: watchOS-style stepped slider: minus/plus buttons flanking a segmented track.

fields.name: value
fields.notes: Initial filled stops.

fields.name: live
fields.notes: v12: with an `id`, stream step changes as widget events. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`.

notes: The zui.h stops/icon_lo/icon_hi/big fields have no CBOR keys - wire segsliders render 5 stops with minus/plus buttons.

widgets.title: Ring
widgets.summary: Single progress ring (full-circle arc).

fields.name: value
fields.notes: 0-100 arc fill.

fields.name: label
fields.notes: Center label (v13 #358).

fields.name: caption
fields.notes: Caption under the ring (v13 #358).

notes: The zui.h size field has no CBOR key - wire rings render 92px.
v13 #358: t/sub are on the wire now; pre-v13 decoders skip them (unlabeled ring).

widgets.title: Activity rings
widgets.summary: Decorative triple activity rings (fixed demo values).
notes: No data fields decode (zui.h size has no CBOR key) - the rings render fixed demo fills at 92px. Decorative only.

widgets.title: Widget card
widgets.summary: Generic data card (gauge/chart/progress/label variants).

fields.name: variant
fields.notes: 0 gauge, 1 chart, 2 progress, 3 label, 4 combo; out-of-range is ignored (gauge).

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Mono caption above the body.

fields.name: value
fields.notes: 0-100; drives the gauge arc / progress bar.

fields.name: value string
fields.notes: Big value line under the body (any unit text).

fields.name: bars
fields.notes: Chart variant: bar values 0-100 (max 16).

fields.name: subtitle
fields.notes: Mono footer line.

fields.name: icon
fields.notes: Lucide icon (label/combo variants only).

notes: The C-side `color` field has no renderer arm and stays unwired.

widgets.title: VU meter
widgets.summary: Static VU bar cluster (audio-level visual).
notes: No fields - renders a fixed bar pattern.

widgets.title: Listening halo
widgets.summary: Concentric accent circles - the listening indicator.
notes: No fields.

widgets.title: Spinner
widgets.summary: Indeterminate progress arc.
notes: The zui.h label field has no CBOR key - wire spinners render the arc alone.

widgets.title: Picker
widgets.summary: Value-row that opens a full-screen select.

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Row label.

fields.name: options
fields.notes: The full-screen select options (max 16).

fields.name: selected
fields.notes: Current option index, shown as the trailing value; out-of-range shows empty.

notes: In pushed docs prefer `choice` when the pick itself is the interaction - picker needs the device picker overlay hook for the full-screen select.

widgets.title: Clock
widgets.summary: Big mono time + date stack.

fields.name: time
fields.notes: Time string (the device does NOT tick it - push updates or use glance faces).

fields.name: date
fields.notes: Secondary date line under the time.

widgets.title: App list
widgets.summary: Launcher-style column of app rows.

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Rendered as a plain column (#328 added it to the container set); functionally `list` - prefer `list` unless you mean launcher semantics.

widgets.title: Box
widgets.summary: Plain container column - the widget-slot content pattern and the modal page wrapper.

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes, stacked vertically.

notes: The zui.h row (horizontal flow) and gap fields have no CBOR keys - wire boxes are vertical columns with default spacing.
A box is a valid doc ROOT (the widget-slot push and modal page shape).

widgets.title: Grid
widgets.summary: Wrapping N-column grid of children.

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes; each sized to an equal column share.

fields.name: columns
fields.notes: Column count 1-4 (clamped); absent = 2.

notes: v13 #358: cols is on the wire now; pre-v13 decoders skip it and render 2 columns.

widgets.title: Stepper dots
widgets.summary: Progress pills (done/total).

fields.name: total
fields.notes: Pill count (0 renders one dim pill).

fields.name: done
fields.notes: Pills 0..done-1 render wide + accent.

widgets.title: Tabs
widgets.summary: Pill segmented page nav.

fields.name: labels
fields.notes: Segment labels (max 16).

fields.name: selected
fields.notes: Accented segment index; out-of-range matches nothing.

widgets.title: Toggle
widgets.summary: Standalone labeled switch card (title + subtitle left, switch right; whole-row tap flips).

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Switch label.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.notes: Secondary line under the label.

fields.name: on
fields.notes: Initial state: 1 = on.

fields.name: live
fields.notes: v12: with an `id`, stream flips as widget events. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`.

widgets.title: Select
widgets.summary: Checkbox (multi) / radio option group with trailing checks.

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Group header above the inset card.

fields.name: options
fields.notes: Option labels, one cell each (max 16).

fields.name: multi
fields.notes: true = checkbox group (uses `on`), false/absent = radio (uses `sel`).

fields.name: selected
fields.notes: Radio: the checked option index.

fields.name: on flags
fields.notes: Checkbox: per-option 0/1 checked; a shorter list reads 0 for the tail.

fields.name: live
fields.notes: v12: with an `id`, taps stream the option index as widget events. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`.

notes: With a node `id` the tapped option index collects into the terminal values{} map.

widgets.title: Section
widgets.summary: Inset-joined grouped list: uppercase header + one card, children joined with hairline dividers.

fields.name: title
fields.notes: Group header (rendered uppercase mono above the card).

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Child nodes (usually rows), joined into one card.

widgets.title: Dial
widgets.summary: Radial hub + spokes (thumb-reach action wheel).

fields.name: hub label
fields.notes: Center hub text.

fields.name: spokes
fields.notes: Spoke labels, placed clockwise from the top (max 16; 4-6 fit).

notes: Full-screen radial layout - give it the screen (do not stack it in a column).

widgets.title: Banner
widgets.summary: Inline info/warn/error strip: icon + wrapping text on a tinted surface.

fields.name: text
fields.notes: Banner text (wraps).

fields.name: icon
fields.notes: Leading Lucide icon name.

fields.name: variant
fields.notes: 0 = info (accent, default), 1 = warn, 2 = error.

widgets.title: Progress bar
widgets.summary: Determinate horizontal bar, 0-100.

fields.name: value
fields.notes: 0-100 fill.

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Indicator palette ref (same table as btn col); 0 = accent.

widgets.title: Widget slot
widgets.summary: Glance-face placeholder substituted by the slot resolver at render.
widgets.reason: Firmware-only BY DESIGN (#328 decision): `idx`/`family` have no CBOR keys because substitution requires the device-side glance-face slot resolver (zui_render_set_slot_resolver) - outside glance composition a pushed slot can only render the dashed unassigned placeholder, so streaming one is never meaningful. Glance-composition IR only.

widgets.title: Pageview
widgets.summary: Multi-page document root - each child is one page (the modal `body` shape).

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Pages. In a modal the device frames them with a STEP n OF m eyebrow + paging dots - do not add your own.

notes: Outside the modal renderer a pageview degrades to page 1 + static dots.

widgets.title: Choice
widgets.summary: Tappable option list (THE streamable picker): one inset card, a cell per option.

fields.name: children
fields.notes: Options: text/row/btn nodes. Each option needs an `id` (rides the reply) and a label; options without a resolvable label are skipped.

fields.name: advance
fields.notes: v12 wizard auto-advance: a pick acks and pages forward; terminal on the last page (the picked option id becomes the action). JSON `advance: true`; wire key `adv`.

notes: With a node `id` the picked option collects into the terminal values{} map.

widgets.title: Image
widgets.summary: A foreground image. The asset reference rides the node id; push the pixels over the asset plane first, then reference them.
notes: The asset ref is the node `id`, resolved against the on-device asset store (#547). No image-specific CBOR keys decode today; push the encoded image over the XFER asset plane before a surface references it. A missing asset renders a placeholder, never a blank or crash.
